I wanted to give you a really quick overview of the 15-point sales page in a theme plate, which is really the basis for this entire program. Module 2 is all about your 3D avatar and creating the launch Bible, as well as all the different research components that go into that. The rest of the program modules, 3 through 6, are all about tackling the various sections of this theme plate. There are 15 specific sections, as well as some bonus closes, which we're going to explore later. I do recommend that you, as much as possible, follow this order. At some point, yes, maybe you feel like you can change things up and take things in a different flow and in a different direction. That's fine if you're feeling really confident and strongly about it, but these sections are engineered in a very specific, intentional way. Where possible, do follow that order and only call audibles if you feel it's absolutely, essentially, necessary for whatever reason. With that said, Module 3 is where you're going to look into sections 1 through 5. These are all about establishing the gap, creating that distance between what they're currently experiencing in the moment of highest tension and where they want to be, that moment of highest pleasure, what things look like once redemption is restored, once that injustice they're experiencing in that moment of highest tension has been dissolved. We're creating that gap in Module 3. In Module 4, we're going to explore what is happening in that gap. We're going to look at the sacred cows that have led to that gap even existing. We're going to take those things, slaughter them, and install some more empowering beliefs in their place. This is going to be very diagnostic as to why things have happened, the way they've happened up to now, and how they need to look at things differently if they want to produce a different result. We're going to do that through Section 6, 7, 8, and 9. We're going to move into Module 5, which is going to be the invitation to exit the gap using our product as that vehicle. We're going to reveal our product for the first time at this point. They finally have the understanding of what it takes to achieve the result. We have buy-in on the beliefs that our product satisfies. This is where we actually extend that invitation to exit the gap. Module 6 is about escaping the gap. These are where you ramp up the urgency. Whereas before, it was an invitation to exit, this is where we dial it up and tell them it's time to escape. We do that through getting them very present with the choice that exists and the divergent roads that exist should they choose to stay where they're at or take our escape vehicle, our product, and start moving towards this moment of highest pleasure, which we got commitment and buy-in on earlier. This is a very high-level overview of the 15 sections. We are going to go much deeper into each one as we hit them in each module. This is a quick overview. I don't want to go too deep into this right now. We're going to hit each one when the time comes. Print this out. Have it handy. It's going to come in handy for the rest of the course. Take a breather and I'll see you in the next lesson.
